TYLER TO FILE PAPERS USING THE CORRECT SPELLING OF HER NAME, SHE DOES NOT NEED THE PERMISSION OF THE COURT TO DO SO. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: W. Notice Of Motion To Grant Name Change
Off Calendar Dec-17-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant Catherine Tyler's motion to grant change of name of party is off calendar. To the extent the motion seeks to change the caption of this case, the caption is fixed at the time of the filing of the case. To the extent the motion seeks permission for Ms. Tyler to file papers using the correct spelling of her name, she does not need the permission of the court to do so.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/HEK)
